title: German Malty Crusted Pork Chops
description: A hearty German-inspired dish with a malty crust on a tender pork chop, served with a side of flavorful Ligurian greens.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and black pepper.
Dip each pork chop into the crushed malty, coating evenly.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the pork chops for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C).
Meanwhile, heat the raw honey in a small saucepan over low heat.
Toss the Ligurian greens in the honey until coated.
Serve the pork chops with the honey-glazed greens.
